name: itrp-subtabs-in-applayout
description: Ensure ITRP section has sub-tabs: Summary, Settings, Maintenance. Should already be in AppLayout — verify and fix if needed.
instruction: Check frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx for ITRP sub-tabs. Per 07-navigation.md: ITRP route should show sub-tabs for Summary (/itrp), Settings (/itrp/settings), Maintenance (/itrp/maintenance). If already present, verify routing works. If not, add sub-tab rendering for /itrp paths.
acceptance_criteria: ITRP section shows 3 sub-tabs: Summary, Settings, Maintenance
Clicking each navigates to correct route

name: itrp-country-info-panel
description: Add Country Info panel to ITRP page showing per-sale-type status: Legal, Economic, Insurance with next purchase date and status chips.
instruction:
In frontend/src/app/itrp/page.tsx: Add right-side panel after cashflow cards showing:
- Section title 'Country Info'
- 3 rows: Legal, Economic, Insurance
- Each row: sale type name, next purchase date (from schedule), status chip (completed/in_progress/not_started)
- Status derived from last purchase record for that sale type in the country
- Use mock data initially — real data needs BQ query by sales_type
acceptance_criteria: Country Info panel visible on ITRP page
Shows Legal, Economic, Insurance rows with status chips

name: itrp-expandable-eligibles
description: Make Eligibles row in summary table expandable with sub-rows: Economic, Legal, Insurance. Show amounts per type.
instruction: In frontend/src/app/itrp/page.tsx cashflow summary table: The 'Eligibles' row should be expandable (click to toggle). When expanded, show 3 sub-rows: Economic, Legal, Insurance with their amounts. Mock amounts (proportional split of total eligibles). Use Ant Design Collapse or simple toggle with arrow icon.
acceptance_criteria: Expanded shows Economic, Legal, Insurance sub-rows with amounts

name: itrp-visual-polish
description: Add alternating row colors to data grid. Add queue button placeholder. Polish per Figma spec.
instruction:
In page.tsx:
1. Data grid rows: alternate between white and #FAFAFA background
2. Add Queue button (CloudSyncOutlined, blue outlined) in header area — onClick shows message.info('Queue panel coming soon')
3. Verify font sizes match spec (12px body, Inter for headers)
acceptance_criteria: Data grid has alternating row colors
Queue button visible with placeholder action

name: itrp-left-report-panel
description: Add collapsible left panel with 3 report sections: ITRP Report, Settlement Report, Previously Purchased. Uses /api/itrp/reports endpoint.
instruction:
In page.tsx: Add left panel (collapsible sidebar or card stack) showing 3 report sections:
1. ITRP Report — from /api/itrp/reports filtered by category
2. Settlement Report — filtered
3. Previously Purchased — filtered
Each section: collapsible with arrow, table with Category, Date, Week, Actions (download icon placeholder). Use existing mock /api/itrp/reports endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: Each shows report rows with date and week

name: verify-o006
description: Deep-verify O-006: ITRP page matches spec, all sections present, tests pass, docker build works.
instruction:
1. ruff check + frontend lint
2. python -m pytest tests/unit/ — all pass
3. docker compose up --build — verify ITRP page renders
4. Check each section: sub-tabs, country dropdown, cashflow cards, summary table, country info, data grid, report panel, queue button
5. Update O-006 KR progress
